text.title: GA4 Conversion Goals and Funnel Setup
text.summary: How to configure GA4 conversion events, assign monetary value, and define multi-step funnels.

rule.statement: Mark events as conversions in GA4 Admin → Events by toggling "Mark as conversion"; assign monetary value via the `value` and `currency` parameters on every purchase-type event.
rule.rationale: Events without value make revenue attribution impossible in GA4. Without the conversion toggle, events do not appear in Goals reports or inform bidding in linked Google Ads campaigns.

section.title: Key SaaS Conversion Events

rule.statement: Define funnels in GA4 Explorations → Funnel exploration with explicit named steps; instrument each step with a distinct event rather than relying on page-view sequence.
rule.rationale: Page-view funnels break on SPAs and client-side routing. Named events are stable across routing changes and portable to other analytics tools.

section.title: Subscription Funnel Steps

text.reference: FunnelTracker class with step, completion, and abandonment tracking
